title: Charlie Chan's Greatest Case
writer: Earl Derr Biggers, Lester Cole, Marion Orth
actors: Warner Oland, Heather Angel, Roger Imhof
plot: When a good-for-nothing man named Dan is stabbed to death and his arm broken, Charlie Chan is on the case. His first clue comes from the victim's sister, who noticed a prowler wearing a glow-in-the-dark wristwatch.
